MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Ethan Jacobs; Ethan Jacobs Law Corporation; 415-275-0845; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff St. James Diversified Belvedere LLC.
Abigail McLaughlin; Manning & Kass, Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP; 213-624-6900; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant UMRO Realty Corp. d/b/a The Agency.
David C. MacPherson; Law Offices of David C. MacPherson; 415-924-1235; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Tracy McLaughlin.
Alan Jacobus; Shannon B. Jones Law Group, Inc.; 925-837-2317; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Pacific Union International Inc. (from consolidated matter CGC-20-582135)
Tracy McLaughlin; defendant, in attendance via Zoom.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT TRACY MCLAUGHLIN, UMRO REALTY CORP DBA THE AGENCY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jun-10-2021 Continued To Jun-18-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS TRACY MCLAUGHLIN and UMRO REALTY CORP DBA THE AGENCY's Motion For Change Of Venue is transferred to be heard in department 501 on June 18, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases arising out of the acquisition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. All parties shall provide courtesy copies of their filings with department 501 by June 11, 2021.
